calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857.

Darius Chan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Eric Wu, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Ramon Mata; Marian Mata.
Default was entered against defendant on December 30, 2010
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 20, 2011.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Eric Wu, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ramon Mata; Marian Mata as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9275.00; Prejudgmt int. 10% - $1802.95
Costs - $504.35, for a total judgment in the amount of $11,582.30

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Off Calendar
